name: Inori Yamabuki
description: A second-year at Christian Private White Clover Academy. Her alter ego is Cure Pine. Inori is calm, gentle, quiet, and shy, making her stand out somewhat from the other three relatively rambunctious Fresh! Cures. She tends to worry about what others think of her, and gets embarrassed easily. She is very protective of those she cares for, though she usually prefers to avoid disputes whenever possible. description: Enju's younger twin. They both use a spear and wakizashi in battle, they're both friendly and mischievous, but Kaede feels he's more manly than his elder brother.

He previously infiltrated Professional Kaiju Cleaning Company Monster Sweeper. ~! In his fused form with an Ant-type kaiju, No. 9 has the lower part of his body replaced by an Ant kaiju which he controls and uses to move around. In this form, No. 9 lacks forearms and hands. !~ ~! name: Kanaka Amaya
description: A high school student and considered the moodmaker amongst her friends. She is a prankster and is always looking to tease Saki, Ayuko or anyone else within running distance.

He has a warrior-like mentality, and he only cares about seeking a battle that can satisfy him. Kendou believes it's unbecoming for a fighter to use weapons and that everyone should fight with the power of their bodies. name: Kokoro Akechi
description: The leader of Genius 4 (known as G4 for short), a police investigation unit. She is a genius, bossy girl who looks down on Milky Holmes since they lost their toys, and is particularly annoyed by Sherlock (by calling her Koko-chan), often whacking her with a gold mask. She always says that she graduated in Harvard in the age 13 and that she has an IQ of 1300. Her name is based on Edogawa Rampo's Kogoro Akechi. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Kyouya Garyuu
description: Kristoph's younger brother, a prosecutor, as well as lead vocalist and lead guitar for the rock band the Gavinners, made up of various people in law enforcement. In a stark contrast to the series' previous prosecutors, Klavier, despite being a perfectionist, does not strive for maintaining a perfect record in the courtroom, but making sure that justice is duly served by working with the defense attorneys to achieve the proper verdict. name: Lopmon
description: Lopmon is the "twin sibling" of Terriermon, despite having different colors and more horns. While Terriermon is an over-confident sort and tends to make sarcastic remarks, Lopmon is shy and polite. She/He also has an opposing lonesome personality to the excitable Terriermon. Lopmon spoke in an antiquated dialect in the Japanese version that lacked gender-differing pronouns. Furthermore, while Terriermon is a dog with rabbit's ears, Lopmon is an actual rabbit digimon.

name: Lycion
description: __Height__: 170 cm (5'7") Lycion is a member of Mithrun's squad of Canaries. He is an aloof, laid-back elf. Like many of the other Canaries, he has notches cut into his ears, a mark of being convicted of using black magic. ~!Lycion is able to turn into a canine beast and is comfortable even in partial transformation. name: Miharu Kiryuu
description: __Height:__ 157 cm (5'2") He is a very polite and elegant vampire with absolutely no filter. He will say whatever is on his mind, no matter how rude it is. He doesn't drink blood but uses his soul-stealing ability to absorb vital energy of others. He joins the Otogi household as Nico's fourth familiar.

name: Mihui Yang
description: __Height:__ 148 cm A student in Class 2-3. Mihui runs a MeTube channel called HuiHui TV. ~!The unknown extra that helped Chaerin.!~

name: Misaki Hotori
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") A girl who has barely any presence and has a complex over her body, so people easily forget her. However because she was born on Seiran Island, she doesn't care about people staring at her chest during conversations.
